title: El cura de aldea
writer: Carlos de Arpe, Enrique Pérez Escrich, Florián Rey
actors: Manuel Alares, Leo de Córdoba, Luis Infiesta
plot: Angela's brother is the most important bandit in Salamanca and is killed by Angela's husband. She does not say that he is her brother and her husband believes that he was her lover, so the child she is waiting for is abandoned in ...
